message:
fix: self-link dedup, HPACK empty-name rejection, process poll backoff, and misc formatting

link.rs: self-links (task_a == task_b) are now indexed once in
task_index instead of twice, preventing peers_of from returning the
same task as both peer entries. Test added.

http/h2/hpack.rs: HPACK decoder now rejects literal headers with empty
names as a compression error per RFC 9113 Section 8.2.1, instead of
accepting them. The test is updated from asserting acceptance to
asserting rejection.

process.rs: Child::wait_with_output poll loop now uses exponential
backoff sleep (1ms → 2ms → 4ms → ... → 50ms cap) when no progress
is made, instead of yielding. This prevents busy-spinning when waiting
for slow child processes.

runtime/builder.rs: browser/WASM status documentation expanded.
runtime/reactor/registration.rs: registration improvements.
runtime/state.rs: state tracking updates.

distributed/encoding.rs: import order and assert formatting cleanup.
grpc/health.rs: method chain formatting.
audit/ambient.rs: updated line number for ambient finding.
service/filter.rs: trailing whitespace removed.
transport/router.rs: router adjustments.
web/middleware.rs: middleware updates.
body_bridge.rs: match arm formatting cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,7 +93,7 @@ pub const KNOWN_FINDINGS: &[AmbientFinding] = &[
     // ── Spawn ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     AmbientFinding {
         file: "time/sleep.rs",
-        line: 524,
+        line: 582,
         evidence_pattern: "std::thread::spawn",
         category: AmbientCategory::Spawn,
         severity: Severity::Warning,
